title: cotylelobium burckii
intro: Cotylelobium burckii, also known as the Burck's ironwood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cotylelobium burckii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Cotylelobium burckii include tea, infusion, and decoction, which are made by steeping the plant's leaves, bark, or roots in hot water to create a medicinal remedy.
